## Describe the bug

What you expected to happen (e.g., expected to see amplification ratio ≈ 3.94×).

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages or unexpected outputs.

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11.5]
- Key package versions: `pandas X.Y.Z`, `linearmodels X.Y.Z`, etc.
